channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SHASHANK] Prilika Enterprises Hikes Stake in Shashank Traders to 19.55%
item.description:
Prilika Enterprises Pvt Ltd acquired 274,867 equity shares of Shashank Traders Limited, increasing its total holding to 604,834 shares, representing 19.55% of the company's equity. The acquisition was made off-market on May 7, 2026. Before the acquisition, Prilika's holding was 329,967 shares, or 10.67%. The equity share capital of Shashank Traders Limited remains at ₹3,09,38,000, comprising 3,093,800 equity shares of ₹10 each.

  • Prilika Enterprises acquired 274,867 shares of Shashank Traders.
  • Prilika's stake in Shashank Traders increased to 19.55%.
  • The acquisition was executed off-market on May 7, 2026.
  • Shashank Traders' equity share capital remains at ₹3,09,38,000.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shashank Traders Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [TIRUFIN] Tirupati Fincorp Board Meeting Rescheduled to May 15, 2026
item.description:
Tirupati Fincorp Ltd has announced the rescheduling of its Board Meeting, originally scheduled for May 13, 2026, to May 15, 2026, due to unforeseen circumstances. The company informed the stock exchange of the postponement via a letter dated May 6, 2026.

  • Tirupati Fincorp's board meeting rescheduled to May 15, 2026.
  • Original meeting date was May 13, 2026.
  • The rescheduling is due to unavoidable circumstances.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tirupati Fincorp Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHASHANK] Aditya Birla Acquires 8.88% Stake in Shashank Traders
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aditya Vikram Birla acquired 274,866 equity shares of Shashank Traders Limited, representing 8.88% of the total share/voting capital. This acquisition, made on May 7, 2026, increased Birla's total holding in the company to 670,860 shares, or 21.68% of the total share/voting capital. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Aditya Birla acquired 274,866 shares of Shashank Traders Ltd.
  • The acquisition represents 8.88% of Shashank Traders' total share capital.
  • Birla's total holding in Shashank Traders is now 21.68%.
  • The acquisition was made on May 7, 2026.
  • Disclosure filed under SEBI Takeover Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shashank Traders Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [GOKEX] Gokaldas Exports: SBI MF stake decreases by 2% to 5.43%
item.description:
SBI Mutual Fund's shareholding in Gokaldas Exports Ltd has decreased by 2% to 5.4317% as of May 07, 2026. This reduction comes after SBI Mutual Fund sold 7,18,670 shares, representing 0.9808% of the company's paid-up share capital. The previous disclosure on January 29, 2026, reported a holding of 7.7585%. The current holding stands at 39,80,000 shares.

  • SBI Mutual Fund's holding in Gokaldas Exports decreased to 5.4317%.
  • SBI Mutual Fund sold 7,18,670 shares of Gokaldas Exports.
  • The sale represents 0.9808% of Gokaldas Exports' paid-up share capital.
  • The transaction occurred on May 07, 2026.
  • Previous holding reported on January 29, 2026, was 7.7585%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GOKALDAS EXPORTS LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [AUTOIND] Autoline Industries Clarifies on Price Movement
item.description:
Autoline Industries Ltd. responded to a BSE query regarding recent price movement in its securities, stating that it has consistently disclosed all relevant information, including price-sensitive details, as required by SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company attributes the share price movement to market conditions and asserts it has no control over or specific knowledge of the reasons behind it. Autoline reiterates its commitment to complying with regulatory disclosure requirements.

  • Autoline Industries clarifies that price movement is purely market-driven.
  • The company confirms adherence to SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • All material information is regularly disclosed to stock exchanges.
  • Autoline has no specific knowledge of reasons for price fluctuations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AUTOLINE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [APOLLOFI] Apollo Finvest Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Apollo Finvest India Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also re-appointed Mr. Amey Chaubal as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27 and re-appointed Mr. Akash Saxena as a Non-Executive and Independent Director for a second term from June 30, 2026, until June 29, 2031, subject to shareholder approval. The company confirmed it is not identified as a Large Corporate as of March 31, 2026, according to SEBI circular.

  • Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, approved.
  • Amey Chaubal re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Akash Saxena re-appointed as Non-Executive and Independent Director, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Company confirms it is not identified as a Large Corporate as of March 31, 2026.
  • Board meeting commenced at 05.30 P.M. and concluded at 11.30 P.M.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: APOLLO FINVEST (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [APOLLOFI] Apollo Finvest Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Apollo Finvest India Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the re-appointment of Mr. Amey Chaubal as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27 and re-appointed Mr. Akash Saxena as a Non-Executive and Independent Director for a second term from June 30, 2026, to June 29, 2031, subject to shareholder approval. The company confirmed it is not identified as a Large Corporate as per SEBI circular dated October 19, 2023.

  • Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, approved.
  • Mr. Amey Chaubal re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Mr. Akash Saxena re-appointed as Non-Executive and Independent Director, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Company confirms it is not identified as a Large Corporate as per SEBI guidelines.
  • Board meeting commenced at 05.30 P.M. and concluded at 11.30 P.M.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: APOLLO FINVEST (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MEESHO] Meesho Invests ₹99.99 Cr in Subsidiary MPPL via Rights Issue
item.description:
Meesho Ltd has made an additional investment of ₹99.99 crore in its subsidiary, Meesho Payments Private Limited (MPPL), through a rights issue. This investment involves subscribing to 30,58,103 equity shares at a premium of ₹326 each. The investment aims to support MPPL's business operations, growth, and regulatory requirements. MPPL's turnover as of March 31, 2026, was ₹1,104.65 lakhs, with a net loss of ₹2,471.67 lakhs. The shareholding percentage of Meesho in MPPL remains unchanged at 99.99%.

  • Meesho invests ₹99.99 Cr in MPPL through rights issue.
  • MPPL's turnover was ₹1,104.65 lakhs with a net loss of ₹2,471.67 lakhs as of March 31, 2026.
  • The investment will not change Meesho's 99.99% shareholding in MPPL.
  • The investment aims to support MPPL's business operations and growth.
  • The transaction was conducted at arm's length based on an independent valuation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meesho Ltd | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [SRAMSET] Shriram AMC Board Meeting on May 15, 2026 to Consider Results
item.description:
Shriram Asset Management Company Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 15, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company has informed the BSE about this meeting in compliance with SEBI regulations.

  • Shriram AMC's board will meet on May 15, 2026.
  • The meeting will consider audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • The announcement complies with SEBI's Listing Obligations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHRIRAM ASSET MANAGEMENT CO.LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MCX] MCX FY26 PAT More Than Doubled to ₹1,332 Cr, Up 138% YoY
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd (MCX) reported a record performance for FY 2025-26, with PAT more than doubling to ₹1,332 crores, a 138% YoY increase. Total income rose by 101% YoY to ₹2,429 crores, and EBITDA increased by 133% YoY to ₹1,774 crores. The Average Daily Turnover (ADT) grew by 145% YoY to ₹5.4 lakh crores. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹8 per share. Revenue from Operations for Q4FY26 stood at ₹889 crores, a growth of ~205% over Q4FY25.

  • MCX's FY26 PAT increased by 138% YoY to ₹1,332 crores.
  • Total Income for FY26 grew by 101% YoY to ₹2,429 crores.
  • The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹8 per share.
  • Q4FY26 Revenue from Operations grew by ~205% YoY to ₹889 crores.
  • MCX ranks as the world’s largest Commodity Options Exchange.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MULTI COMMODITY EXCHANGE OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result
